top_signals.title: Modi courts Indo-Pacific partners as China, U.S. reshape region
top_signals.summary: Modi has stepped up engagement across the Indo-Pacific, signing a flurry of agreements and underscoring New Delhi's ambition to play a bigger role in the region.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
